extraction.one_line_summary: DENNIS Rohan won the stage 7 ITT by 7 seconds over VAN EMDEN Jos, but QUINTANA Nairo defended 50 seconds over PINOT Thibaut to win overall by 25 seconds.
tactical_patterns: QUINTANA Nairo leaked 18 seconds to DENNIS Rohan in ITT after winning on mountain stage, revealing defensive time trial posture.
PINOT Thibaut lost 16-second GC buffer to DENNIS by going 11 seconds slower at first check, showing poor pacing strategy.
VAN EMDEN Jos posted fastest time early, forcing later starters into aggressive negative-splitting rather than conservative early pacing.

rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: positive: Won ITT as pre-race favorite and moved from third at 1:06 to second at 25 seconds, confirming TT strength in stage races.
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: Defended overall but went 89th at intermediate check 21 seconds down, showing he prioritized not cracking over optimizing watts.
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: Dropped from second to third overall after losing 16-second buffer, went 11 seconds slower than DENNIS at first check showing pacing collapse.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Moved to fourth at 45 seconds after strong ITT, signal of emerging GC reliability in week-long stage races.
rider_signals.VAN EMDEN Jos: positive: Posted benchmark time early forcing defensive rides from GC contenders, demonstrating domestique ITT depth disrupts conservative pacing.
